name: Aldous
intro: Aldous, the Soul Contractor, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Contract: Transform
abilities.description: Shield After every 2 attacks , Aldous gains a 500 (+3 × Soul Steal stack count) shield for 3 seconds on his next Basic Attack . This effect can only be triggered once every 5 seconds. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Shield Special HP is preferentially deducted when taking damage. The shield with shorter duration or lower points is usually preferentially deducted when multiple shields are stacked.

abilities.name: Contract: Soul Steal
abilities.description: Aldous unleashes his inner energy to enhance his next Basic Attack to kill enemies and absorb their soul each stack gives to deal Physical Damage equal to 200–450 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage plus 5 times the number of Soul Steal stacks. If this attack kills an [ Lord / Turtle /]enemy hero/[enemy turret/] Siege Minion /other-non hero unit, Aldous will gain [12/12/10/10/10/4] stacks of Soul Steal (up to 650 stacks). The enhanced Basic Attack deals 300% extra Base Damage to Minions and Creeps . Aldous gets extra 5/2 stack) when a nearby enemy Siege Minion/other non-hero unit dies. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal.

abilities.name: Contract: Explosion
abilities.description: Buff CC Aldous assumes a defensive stance, gaining 30% Damage Reduction and 20% extra Movement Speed for 2 seconds or until manual cancellation. He then deals 100–200 (+20% Total Physical Attack) –200–400 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and stuns them for 0.5–1 second(s) (scales with defensive stance duration). Skill terms Dodge You are immune to enemy Basic Attack damage and effects within the duration. Damage Reduction Deduct the final damage (the damage that has deducted by Physical and Magic DEF) by [fixed points] or by percent. But cannot deduct the True Damage. Stun Basic level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt some skills.

abilities.name: Contract: Chase Fate
abilities.description: Mobility Damage Aldous gains vision of all enemy heroes for 5 seconds. During this time, if Aldous uses this skill again, he can dash toward an enemy hero [of choice]. When Aldous hits that enemy hero, he will deal 400–750 (+target's 8% Total HP) Physical Damage and knock back the target for 1 second. (Aldous can interrupt target's Recall [and Arrival ] during the dash.) [Use this skill once again to cancel the dash, and will blink to the designated direction instead.] Skill terms Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together. Max HP The maximum HP currently can have. Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.
